title: scutellaria orientalis subsp. haussknechtii
intro: Scutellaria orientalis subsp. haussknechtii is a subspecies of the Oriental skullcap plant, a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Iran and Turkey. The medicinal properties of Scutellaria orientalis subsp. haussknechtii include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, due to its sedative and relaxing effects. The herbal preparations of Scutellaria orientalis subsp. haussknechtii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
